entries.title: Collect JS files (katana -jc + gau + subjs + getJS)
entries.deps: go install github.com/projectdiscovery/katana/cmd/katana@latest · go install github.com/lc/gau/v2/cmd/gau@latest · go install github.com/lc/subjs@latest · go install github.com/003random/getJS/v2@latest
entries.body:
Collects **all .js file links** of the target from several sources and merges them into a single list. katana with the `-jc` flag (JS crawl) parses linked scripts while crawling, gau pulls .js from archives, subjs and getJS extract `<script src>` from pages. The output is a unique list of JS bundle URLs for further endpoint and secret analysis.

> katana and getJS make ACTIVE requests to the target (crawling) - only within scope. gau is passive (archives). Accepts either a domain or a file with a list of URLs/hosts.

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# collect_js.sh - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
set -uo pipefail
TARGET="${1:?usage: collect_js.sh <domain|urls.txt>}"
OUT="js_urls.txt"
have() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
TMP="$(mktemp -d)"; trap 'rm -rf "$TMP"' EXIT

if [ -f "$TARGET" ]; then SEED="$TARGET"; else printf '%s\n' "https://$TARGET" > "$TMP/seed"; SEED="$TMP/seed"; fi

echo "[*] katana -jc" >&2
have katana && katana -silent -jc -d 2 -list "$SEED" 2>/dev/null \
  | grep -iE '\.js(\?|$)' >> "$TMP/js" || true

echo "[*] gau (.js)" >&2
if have gau; then
  if [ -f "$TARGET" ]; then DOM="$(head -1 "$TARGET" | sed -E 's#https?://##; s#/.*##')"; else DOM="$TARGET"; fi
  gau --subs "$DOM" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\.js(\?|$)' >> "$TMP/js" || true
fi

echo "[*] subjs" >&2
have subjs && subjs -i "$SEED" 2>/dev/null >> "$TMP/js" || true

echo "[*] getJS" >&2
have getJS && getJS --input "$SEED" --complete 2>/dev/null >> "$TMP/js" || true

sort -u "$TMP/js" | grep -iE '\.js(\?|$)' > "$OUT" || true
echo "[+] $(wc -l < "$OUT") JS URLs -> $OUT" >&2
```

Run:
```bash
./collect_js.sh target.com
# or for a list of live hosts:
./collect_js.sh live_subs.txt
```

entries.title: JS endpoint extractor (LinkFinder-style regex, stdlib)
JS secret scanner (API keys / tokens / private keys)
JS mass scan (fetch -> endpoints + secrets -> dedup)
entries.body:
Takes a **list of JS file URLs** (for example, the output of `collect_js.sh`), downloads them in parallel and runs them through both original checks: endpoint extraction (LinkFinder style) and secret hunting. Results are deduplicated and split into two files: `endpoints.txt` and `secrets.txt`. This is the `collect_js.sh -> jsendpoints.py + jssecrets.py` chain in a single multi-threaded pass.

> Downloads real files from the target (active). Threads are controlled with `-w`. To confirm live secrets, eyeball `secrets.txt` and verify with trufflehog (AGPL, external binary, `--results=verified`).

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# js_mass_scan.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
import argparse, re, requests
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
requests.packages.urllib3.disable_warnings()

ENDPOINT = re.compile(r'''(?:"|')((?:https?:)?//[^"'\s]{3,}|/[A-Za-z0-9_./?&=#%~+-]{2,}|[A-Za-z0-9_./-]+?\.(?:php|asp|aspx|jsp|json|do|action)\b[^"'\s]*)(?:"|')''')
NOISE = re.compile(r'\.(png|jpe?g|gif|svg|css|woff2?|ttf|ico|mp4)(\?|$)', re.I)
SECRETS = {
    "github-pat": re.compile(r"ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}"),
    "aws-akia":   re.compile(r"AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}"),
    "slack":      re.compile(r"xox[baprs]-[0-9A-Za-z-]{10,48}"),
    "google-api": re.compile(r"AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}"),
    "stripe":     re.compile(r"sk_live_[0-9A-Za-z]{20,}"),
    "jwt":        re.compile(r"eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]{8,}\.eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]{8,}\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]{8,}"),
    "priv-key":   re.compile(r"-----BEGIN (?:RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----"),
}

def fetch(url):
    try:
        r = requests.get(url, verify=False, timeout=20, headers={"User-Agent": "ARS3NAL/1.0"})
        return url, r.text
    except requests.RequestException:
        return url, ""

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="ARS3NAL JS mass scan")
    ap.add_argument("-l", "--list", required=True, help="file with a list of .js URLs")
    ap.add_argument("-w", "--workers", type=int, default=10)
    a = ap.parse_args()
    urls = [u.strip() for u in open(a.list) if u.strip()]
    eps, secrets = set(), set()
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=a.workers) as ex:
        for url, body in ex.map(fetch, urls):
            if not body:
                continue
            for m in ENDPOINT.finditer(body):
                ep = m.group(1).strip()
                if len(ep) >= 3 and not NOISE.search(ep):
                    eps.add(ep)
            for name, rx in SECRETS.items():
                for s in rx.findall(body):
                    secrets.add(f"[{name}] {url} :: {s[:80]}")
    with open("endpoints.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(sorted(eps)))
    with open("secrets.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(sorted(secrets)))
    print(f"[+] {len(eps)} endpoints -> endpoints.txt")
    print(f"[+] {len(secrets)} secrets   -> secrets.txt")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Run:
```bash
./collect_js.sh target.com          # -> js_urls.txt
python3 js_mass_scan.py -l js_urls.txt -w 15
```
